title: /Tpa Teleport
description: Allows you to /tpa request other players, /tpa here other players, accept and deny requests.
body:
# Tpa Teleport

## Description

**Tpa Teleport** is a simple and lightweight server-side utility mod for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1 that adds classic teleport request commands. Easily ask other players to teleport to them or request them to come to you, with full request management.

### How It Works (for the user)

- **Send a teleport request**:
  - `/tpa <player>` – Request to teleport to that player.
  - `/tpahere <player>` – Request that player to teleport to you.

- **Manage your outgoing requests**:
  - `/tpacancel <player>` – Cancel a specific pending request you sent.
  - `/tpacancel all` – Cancel all pending requests you have sent.

- **Respond to incoming requests**:
  - `/tpaccept <player>` – Accept a specific teleport request.
  - `/tpacceptall` – Accept all pending teleport requests at once.
  - `/tpadeny <player>` – Deny a specific teleport request.
  - `/tpadenyall` – Deny all pending teleport requests.

- **Request timeout**:
  - Each request lasts for **60 seconds**. If no action is taken within that time, it expires automatically.
  - You can only send **one pending request per player** at a time (though you may have requests out to multiple different players simultaneously).
